target.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm educational mockup
target.scope: design-thinking and 3D-printable assembly package before STL generation
target.not_for: certified industrial robot, payload-rated arm, collaborative safety certification, or precision automation claims

disclaimer: MRL-0.5 readiness evidence only; not manufacturing, flight, medical, or certification approval.

categories.name: overhang/support readiness
categories.note: overhang=45, supports=min, orientation=base flange on bed; links on side with cable channels upward; joint axis faces upward; tool flange face on bed

categories.name: serviceability
categories.note: service access points 10, service terms 307, svg markers 1

loop_feedback:
Preserve MRL-0.5 manufacturing evidence for robot_arm: keep datum, tolerance, service, inspection, and risk traces while improving geometry.
- Add or preserve datum/tolerance/inspection statements tied to visible geometry and assembly interfaces.
- Keep the design at educational mockup level; do not claim certification or real flight/manufacturing readiness.
